programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: Two virginal teenagers lust after a goth girl whos obsessed with Freddy Krueger

programme.title: Monsters
programme.desc: Black comedy about two normal loving human parents who are constantly trying to keep their cute demonic monstrous cannibalistic mutant baby boy from devouring the neighbors Meanwhile a wannabe serial killer is stalking the area

programme.title: Monsters
programme.desc: Young conspiracy theorist Kevin tries to convince his cool skeptical friend Tommy that an old-timey local barbershop is run by vampires in disguise

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A distraught mother enlists the aide of a psychiatrist on a talk show to help her son whos having nightmares about Freddy Krueger Soon the doctor finds Freddys gotten inside of his head too Meanwhile a cameraman sets out to prove the existence of Krueger but he becomes a little too personally involved in his own news story

programme.title: The Last Command
programme.desc: In this fact-based film legendary Texan Jim Bowie Sterling Hayden attempts to come to a nonviolent compromise with Mexican President Santa Anna J Carrol Naish but the negotiations soon turn sour Consuelo de Quesada Anna Maria Alberghetti a Mexican girl with close ties to Jim then warns him that Santa Anas men are planning to invade So Jim Davy Crockett Arthur Hunnicutt and a tiny crew of courageous Texans hide out in an abandoned mission awaiting the violent confrontation

programme.title: Lawmen
programme.desc: While celebrating in an inebriated state a group of cattlemen inadvertently kill an old man in Bannock The righteous marshal of the town vows to punish them

programme.title: Man of the Forest
programme.desc: The kidnapping of an heir to a ranch goes awry when the Man of the Forest mistrusted by the heiress takes matters into his own hands with the help of his pet cougar

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Great Grape Ape
programme.desc: Grape Ape and Beegle Beagles Hawaiian vacation takes them to an island whose natives worship a strangely familiar god named Momo in That Was No Idol -- That Was My Ape Opposing football teams battle over the mighty Grape Ape before a big game in The All-American Ape

programme.title: Hong 114
programme.desc: Hong 114

programme.title: The Long Shadow
programme.desc: Marking the centenary of World War One historian David Reynolds explores the enduring shadow the conflict has cast over Britain and Europe in the century that followed Travelling to locations across Europe from Slovenia to the Sudetenland Belfast to Berlin David Reynolds traces the war’s legacy arguing that it unleashed forces we still grapple with today This remarkable series also looks again at how the experience of war haunted the generation who lived through it in particular the soldiers who survived it – dynamic characters such as Benito Mussolini Eamon de Valera Philippe Petain James Ramsey MacDonald and Thomas Masaryk Reynolds examines how these men shaped the peace that followed war often in unpredictable ways

programme.title: Desert Generals
programme.desc: Britain would have lost her empire and the war in 1942 had Axis forces beaten the British army in the Middle East Tim Collins re-investigates Britain’s critical desert campaign and the controversial battle tactics needed to take on the unbeaten Panzer army in total war preventing Hitler from gaining Egypt Iraq and the oilfields Foreshadowing current world events this oil-rich region was crucial to the war effort These are the World War II battles that shaped the Middle East and created the world in which we live today

programme.title: The Underground War
programme.desc: A two-part documentary about networks of underground tunnels built on the front lines in the First World War During World War One a barbaric war was fought deep beneath the trenches in a maze of tunnels and dugouts over 10 metres underground

programme.title: Desert Generals
programme.desc: Britain would have lost her empire and the war in 1942 had Axis forces beaten the British army in the Middle East Tim Collins re-investigates Britain’s critical desert campaign and the controversial battle tactics needed to take on the unbeaten Panzer army in total war preventing Hitler from gaining Egypt Iraq and the oilfields Foreshadowing current world events this oil-rich region was crucial to the war effort These are the World War II battles that shaped the Middle East and created the world in which we live today

programme.title: The Long Shadow
programme.desc: Marking the centenary of World War One historian David Reynolds explores the enduring shadow the conflict has cast over Britain and Europe in the century that followed Travelling to locations across Europe from Slovenia to the Sudetenland Belfast to Berlin David Reynolds traces the war’s legacy arguing that it unleashed forces we still grapple with today This remarkable series also looks again at how the experience of war haunted the generation who lived through it in particular the soldiers who survived it – dynamic characters such as Benito Mussolini Eamon de Valera Philippe Petain James Ramsey MacDonald and Thomas Masaryk Reynolds examines how these men shaped the peace that followed war often in unpredictable ways

programme.title: The Long Shadow
programme.desc: Marking the centenary of World War One historian David Reynolds explores the enduring shadow the conflict has cast over Britain and Europe in the century that followed Travelling to locations across Europe from Slovenia to the Sudetenland Belfast to Berlin David Reynolds traces the war’s legacy arguing that it unleashed forces we still grapple with today This remarkable series also looks again at how the experience of war haunted the generation who lived through it in particular the soldiers who survived it – dynamic characters such as Benito Mussolini Eamon de Valera Philippe Petain James Ramsey MacDonald and Thomas Masaryk Reynolds examines how these men shaped the peace that followed war often in unpredictable ways

programme.title: Public Cowboy Number 1
programme.desc: Rustlers using modern technology airplanes shortwave radios refrigerated trucks are Genes target

programme.title: Broadway to Cheyenne
programme.desc: A cowboy detective goes up against a gang of big-city thugs trying to set up a protection racket out west

programme.title: The Horror at 37000 Feet
programme.desc: An invisible demon in the cargo hold of a jet airliner terrorizes the passengers

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: During a camping trip the men begin to wonder if their female tracker is a vampire Meanwhile two plane crash survivors whove been feasting on dead passengers are on the verge of rescue when an escaped killer intervenes

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A hooker learns that beauty is only skin deep

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Peggy wants to make sure her honeymoon turns out perfect

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Mean retirement home nurse Jane Reynolds runs the night shift with an iron fist and makes extra money selling the residents jewelry to pawnshops Jane and boyfriend Johnny try to steal a new patients sparkling ring and trouble begins

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: After a shooting a young teenage boy on the run from police stumbles into a hotel where the tenants are not normal

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric wounded by Alamo Joe is saved by a young boy fascinated by monsters werewolves in particular But things get hairy when Moms abusive boyfriend starts slapping her and her son around and Eric saves the day

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric locates Otto Renfield a crippled old sailor who knows Skorzeny and promises to help Eric find him But Renfield betrays Eric and traps him in the hold of his ship for Skorzeny

programme.desc: Knight 309

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Micki Ryan and Jack must track down an evil statue that causes men to kill the women they love

programme.title: The Strange and Deadly Occurance
programme.desc: Something or someone haunts a couples Robert Stack Vera Miles new home in the country

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Both Gomer and Sergeant Carter are conned by an old bum

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Sergeant Carter takes a temporary desk job writing training manuals and considers making it permanent when he sees the platoon does fine without him; so Gomer messes things up to bring the Sergeant back

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A gorilla steals Mrs Howells diamond brooch and while Mr Howell offers a reward to the other castaways for finding it the gorilla kidnaps Mrs Howell too

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A gorilla steals Mrs Howells diamond brooch and while Mr Howell offers a reward to the other castaways for finding it the gorilla kidnaps Mrs Howell too

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grampa and Luke attempt to build a rowboat

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: After Amos mocks Georges painting cheap junk dealer Daggett pays twenty dollars for a painting by George at the McCoy farm so Amos encourages Georges painting to be his manager unaware that Daggett has actually paid for the frame

programme.title: Smart 520
programme.desc: Smart 520

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Get Smart

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: When High Ball Trucking corners the regional supply on diesel and tries to squeeze out the independent carriers BJ taps an alternative fuel source guaranteed to keep him ahead of Hammer and a pesky revenuer

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Roger wants to get out of having to take a trip to San Francisco with Kay and The Posts so he tricks Wilbur into believing that Mister Ed is suddenly going bald which in turn makes Ed a nervous wreck

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Kay inherits country property in New York so Roger enters into an agreement to sell their California home and move The purchaser who works for the IRS threatens to sue the Posts if their behavior is not to is liking

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogans latest underground contacts are secretly German spies

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Sergeant Schultz impersonates Klink in a scheme to get some of his men free from the Gestapo

programme.title: Mchale 325
programme.desc: Mchale 325

programme.title: Mchale 225
programme.desc: Mchale 225

programme.title: Tight Spot
programme.desc: Sherry is a tough woman with a violent past She is asked by the DA to testify against a mobster but she refuses because other witnesses were murdered Soon she falls in love with a policeman

programme.title: The Police Connection
programme.desc: When a “mad bomber” THE RIFLEMAN himself Chuck Connors – as the police computer classifies his suspect type – blows up a high school and a hospital Lieutenant Geronimo Minneli Vince Edwards TV’s BEN CASEY is on his trail He may have a witness in a young mute woman who was raped at the hospital just before the explosion but she is too ashamed to identify her attacker In any case Minneli reasons that it is unlikely that the bomber would stop to rape a woman after planting the bomb and that the rapist and the bomber are likely different people; therefore the rapist himself might be the only one who can help the police catch him Since the police do not know the bomber’s modus operandi but they do know the rapists Minneli starts questioning his past victims

programme.title: Dangerous Crossing
programme.desc: A recently married heiress Ruth Stanton Jeanne Crain embarks on a honeymoon cruise with her new husband John Bowman Carl Betz However shortly after getting on board John disappears None of the crew remember seeing him and the ships manifest has Ruth registered alone and under her maiden name Ruth wanders the boat in search of John but soon the captain and crew believe Ruth must be crazy Only kindly Dr Manning Michael Rennie takes her seriously and helps unravel the mystery

programme.title: Cell 2455 Death Row
programme.desc: Whit condemned and awaiting execution reviews the events of his life that has brought him to Cell 2455 on San Quentins Death Row a story he had told in a autobiography that became a sensational best-seller As a boy the young Whit stole groceries to help feed his impoverished family later moving on into major crime to impress a young gang moll Jo-Anne and turns into a cold-blooded thug when he is repudiated by the girl he loves Doll And by his own lawyer when he is arrested and tried as the infamous Lovers Lane Bandit In cell 2455 he studies law to the point where he wins stay after stay twice within minutes of his scheduled execution

programme.title: Runaway
programme.desc: A group of skiers are trapped inside a runaway train hurtling down a mountainside

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Bo and Luke help family friend Mary Kaye Porter elude a crime boss whos after the 100000 trust fund for Mary Kayes unborn child

programme.title: Hercules 111
programme.desc: Hercules 111

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Zoor agrees to do a live television interview to try to endear himself to humans but the shows producer has an ulterior motive in getting him in front of a camera

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The Morthren have developed a time machine Malzor travels back to 1953 to inject his invading predecessors with an immunity drug to Earths bacteria so theyll complete their original mission of obliterating mankind and colonizing the planet Blackwood and Kinkaid arrive at the aliens research facility and follow Malzor into the past to try and stop him

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Jim encounters Humphrey a dwarf who has escaped from the evil Dr Arcane

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Arcane makes a woman look like Hollands wife He makes sure Holland aka Swamp Thing sees her He approaches her and she runs away He later tests her She then asks him for his notes hoping it could help him But Arcane is after one of his formulas At the same time Holland recalls his last moments with his wife and moment when he became Swamp Thing because of Arcane

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: An Eagle is sent onto the surface of the planet Psychon which has titanium needed for repairs to the Alpha Base It fails to return and is used by Psychon scientist Mentor as bait with which to entice other members of the Alphan crew onto the planet Mentor is building a biological computer that will hopefully transform his deteriorating planet back into the Eden it once was However the machine can only be fueled by the living brains of humans and Mentor has his eye on those of the Alphan crew Fortunately Mentor is not alone on the planet; his innocent daughter the shape-shifting Maya is unaware of her fathers plans so Koenig tries to convince her to side with the Alphans

programme.title: Satans Triangle
programme.desc: A mysterious woman is the sole survivor of a boat wreck caused by a sudden terrible storm off the coast of Florida

programme.desc: When a gang member is killed it signals a turf war between two rival street gangs Meanwhile two youths locate a missing crate of guns and decide to sell them to the gang members

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force mixes dinner and danger at a crime czars private party Jack Wellman has arranged the deaths of four Government officials so he can fill the vacancies with men he controls

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: A favorite son now a huge success comes back to his hometown to start a new operation At first everyone seems to be happy hes back but simmering jealousies come to the front when someone threatens to kill him

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: A woman hires Kimble to drive her daughter and herself to California The young girl has a rabbit with her that had been a test subject in a research study and is infected with meningitis

programme.desc: A senator is targeted by the Pentangle a right wing paramilitary group His pal a former CIA agent and martial artist tries to help him The group kidnaps the agents sister and tries to hunt him down The Most Dangerous Game style

programme.desc: Action superstar Brandon Lee portrays rebellious government agent Michael Gold who is sent on a desperate mission to a Soviet-controlled African nation in order to uncover a top-secret laser weapons operation and destroy it

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The School of Hard Knocks 21 filmed at the Century Casino in Calgary. Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in the cage. Ryan Starkell v. Zack Vaudrin.

programme.title: Hard Knocks

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Hard Knocks 45 continues to bring you some of the best fights in MMA! This episode features matchups between amateur debut fighters Abbas Faleh vs. Tarren Gallamore and strikers Les Bisson vs. Gerra Gossen. The last fight of the night is an exciting Lightweight pro bout between Wolfgang Janssen and Craig Shintani. You do not want to skip this one!

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Chris Kaminesky v. Damien DiMarco - HKF

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Hard Knocks 46 opens with a rare treat: a ladies pro match between champions in differening disciplines, both looking to make their transition to MMA. Lindsay Garbatt is a former World Champion in Boxing while Valeria Mejia is a Pan-American Champion in Sambo. Following this is the main event of the evening, a challenge for the vacant Bantamweight title between Jesse Arnett and Dimitri Waardenburg! You do not want to miss this!

programme.desc: Hristo Hristov v. Tom Spooner

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Jess Elverum and Jenn Wolstenholme go to battle next week...before you see their fight, pick your side! See what daily life is like for these two female athletes to decide who you'll be cheering for when they step in to the cage.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Arvydas Pumutis v. Mobes Aeshoye

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Rodrigo Damm v. Kultar Singh Gill

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Michele Mirabella v. Chris Stebbeds

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.

programme.title: Bleav In Rams
programme.desc: Bleav in Rams brings you the Rams' insight and access that only they can. We provide in-depth analysis on Matthew Stafford, Cooper Kupp, Puka Nacua and the rest of the Los Angeles Rams squad hosted by Erin Coscarelli and Tyler Dragon

programme.title: Bleav in Oregon
programme.desc: Bleav in Oregon takes an insider’s look at the world of Oregon Ducks sports With hosts Jonathan Stewart and Zachary Neel. We get an in-depth look at the world of Oregon football and recruiting with a Ducks reporter and University of Oregon alum.

programme.title: Bleav in Broncos
programme.desc: Denver Broncos insiders Patrick Chiotti and Bri Maestas bring you everything you need to know about the team at Mile High. Get insight and analysis on Bo Nix, Patrick Surtain II, Javonte Williams, and the entire Broncos squad. Tune in for recaps, previews, and guest interviews.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: The Patriots Report
programme.desc: Christopher Price of the Boston Globe and former Patriots WR Chris Hogan bring you an inside look at the New England Patriots.

programme.title: Betting with Bearman
programme.desc: Betting with Bearman is your go-to podcast for sharper sports betting insights. Hosted by David Bearman, a 20-year veteran of the betting industry, each episode dives into the biggest games, top betting trends, and key line movements. Bearman and his guests share their top picks, best bets, leans, and stay-away plays, helping you make smarter decisions and stay ahead of the odds.

programme.title: Simms Complete
programme.desc: Football is the Simms family business. Join former NFL QB Matt Simms & Super Bowl MVP Phil Simms as they share unique insight on the game they love.

programme.title: The Bucky Brooks Show
programme.desc: Bucky Brooks provides the latest insights on the league, featuring expert opinions, guest appearances, and comprehensive NFL Draft coverage.

programme.title: Bleav in Chargers
programme.desc: The greatest fullback in Chargers history Lorenzo Neal hops on the mic with Chargers Play-By-Play Broadcaster Matt "Money" Smith to talk all things Jim Harbaugh, Justin Herbert, and the Los Angeles Chargers.

programme.title: SEC State of Mind
programme.desc: Former SEC Player of the Year and nine-year NFL veteran Jason Campbell teams up with ESPN reporter Taylor Davis on SEC State of Mind. With experience from the field to the booth to the sideline, they bring fresh insight and access while covering the entire Southeastern Conference.

programme.title: Bleav In Falcons
programme.desc: Bleav in Falcons is hosted by former Falcons fullback Ovie Mughelli, a two-time Pro Bowler and standout running Michael Turner, a two-time All-Pro and Pro Bowler, was a standout running back for the Falcons and providing expert insights and in-depth coverage of the Atlanta Falcons.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: Bleav in Panthers
programme.desc: Panthers great, Running Back Jonathan Stewart, is joined by Tobacco Road Sports Radio's Desmond Johnson, and Schuyler Callihan for weekly analysis on the Carolina Panthers!

programme.title: Bleav in Lions
programme.desc: Former Lions All-Pro Glover Quin and 7-time Emmy winner Trevor Thompson break down all the latest buzz around Dan Campbell, Jared Goff, Jahmyr Gibbs, and the Detroit Lions on the Bleav in Lions podcast.

programme.title: Bleav In Bills
programme.desc: Adam Benigni and Sal Maiorana are two of the most experienced reporters in western New York with more than 70 years of experience covering the Buffalo Bills.

programme.title: The Ruffino & Joe Show
programme.desc: Blake Ruffino and Joe DeLeone join forces to talk about the latest in the SEC and College Football

programme.desc: The master writer and producer Mr Brian Stanley returns to the Sherard Show to talk about his upcoming film and play

programme.desc: From pro football star to Hollywood icon Join me as I chop it up with the legendary Mr Fred Williamson

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The Guardians must defeat the invading aliens as well as the Renegades

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Nick Matt and AJ are kidnapped at the heart of Gobotron but when they escape the Renegades they fall into the hands of Wrecks the leader of a gang of thieves who enters Matt in a bizarre form of gladiatorial combat

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Bubblecrafts rise out of the waters Bubblemen are directed by Brotak to kidnap Zandor and TaraAndropon sends his robots to attack the Herculoids only to be defeated Zandor accepts his challenge as he sends his best warrior Ogron

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: The Pride intercepts a message to Saw Boss declaring the Planet Kyros deadly to Monster Minds A weapon there turns everything to crystal Jayce leads everyone to the planet to find this weapon; but upon landing he discovers it is a trap

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: The people of Adelbaron are forced to slave in mines that produce rich nourishment for the Monster Mind vines Saw Boss captures the young brother and sister of Kumari to force her to brig Jayce to him Kumari is picked up in space by the Pride

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM kidnaps a young lizard creature known as a dinosauroid

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM use a cyclonic disruptor to interfere with the operating systems of MASKs vehichles

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: A Decisive Battle!! Axe

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: The Decayed Body

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Mother Brain is hypnotizing residents of an Earth-like world with a special kind of newspaper ink The N team encounters a guy named Julio who tries to get to the bottom of this hypnotic business and is the only one who is not under the effect of the hypnosis The N team discovers that Julio is actually illiterate

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kevin is feeling under the weather since he caught a video virus His friends must help him so they shrink themselves and go inside Kevins body to fight the virus

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The group encounters a unicorn being attacked They manage to help the Unicorn but Uni is captured by a wizard who is capturing Unicorns and stealing their magical horns They must stop the wizard before he become even more powerful than Venger

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Dungeon Master is captured by an evil lord working for Venger The kids must find Dungeon Master and free him before its too late

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Inspector Gadget must find a highly experimental missile stolen by Doctor Claw and stop him from using it to destroy Metro City

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Talon poses as a DJ to infiltrate HQs annual Missionball Ball and trap all the guests with his hypnotic speakers
